title: more crosshairs
description: choose from 57 different types of crosshairs!
body:
This **resource pack** introduces 57 **unique** crosshairs to Minecraft, _giving_ _players_ a **fresh** and **customizable** experience when aiming. Whether you're looking for a **clean**, minimalistic crosshair or something more complex and creative, this pack has something for everyone. Choose from a variety of styles to **enhance** your gameplay and add a personal touch to your world!

### Features:

57 Custom Crosshairs with different designs and styles.


## how to change the crosshair

Locate the "All Crosshairs" Folder:
Inside the resource pack go to assets\minecraft\texures\gui\sprites\hud folder, you will find a folder named "all crosshairs". This folder contains all 57 custom crosshairs.

Pick a Crosshair:
Inside the "all crosshairs" folder, you will see all the available crosshair images (each file is named something like crosshair1.png, crosshair2.png, etc.).

Select and Replace:

To change your crosshair, simply choose the one you want to use.
Copy your chosen crosshair image (e.g., crosshair1.png).
Go to the assets\minecraft\textures\gui\sprites\hud folder
Delete the existing crosshair.png file and paste your new crosshair image into this folder, renaming it to crosshair.png.
Enjoy Your New Crosshair:
Once you've replaced the crosshair, load up Minecraft or press f3+t to reload resourcepack and you'll see your new crosshair in the game

You can always change your crosshair by following these steps again and selecting a new one from the "all crosshairs" folder.
You can also edit the crosshairs to create your own designs if you’re comfortable with any image editing software.
